body.raw:
COPY VALUE OF thriva/sandbox/auth-request secret from Test environment Secret Manager
The token returned in the response to this request needs to be copied over to the auth config of the Thriva API collection in order for the rest of the requests to work

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --request GET \
     --url https://api.thriva.io/v1/orders/order_id \
     --header 'accept: application/vnd.api+json'

bearer.token: COPY TOKEN FROM CREATE TOKEN RESPONSE
